title: Only Time
why_this_song: Only Time by Enya (2000) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Where the day flows, Only time"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "As your heart chose, Only time"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Who can say where the road goes"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Who can say where the road goes"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Where the day flows, Only time"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where the day flows, Only time
And who can say if your love grows
As your heart chose, Only time

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heart" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heart" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Who can say where the road goes
And who can say why your heart cries

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Only Time" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Only Time" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Only Time" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Only Time", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Only Time" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Only Time" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
